state_transitions.trigger: start() called — initiates HTTP health check against NextTrend /healthz
NextTrend API unreachable on start — allows degraded operation
3 consecutive health check failures against NextTrend API
stop() called — clears caches, tokens, and subscriptions

params.name: api_base_url
params.description: NextTrend REST API base URL. Axum-based server typically on port 3011. Supports /tags, /sse, /healthz, /readyz endpoints.

params.name: api_key
params.description: NextTrend API key with ntv1_ prefix. SHA-512 verified server-side. Requires scopes: read:tags, read:history. Preferred over JWT for machine-to-machine auth.

params.name: username
params.description: NextTrend username for JWT authentication. Used when api_key is not provided. Obtains Bearer token via POST /auth/login.

params.name: poll_interval_ms
params.description: Interval between tag value collection polls.

params.name: history_query_limit
params.description: Maximum data points per history query. NextTrend default is 10000 with LTTB downsampling at 2000.

params.name: tag_prefix_filter
params.description: Only collect tags matching this slash-separated path prefix (e.g., WH/WHK01/). Empty means all tags.

params.name: connect_timeout_ms
params.description: HTTP connection timeout for NextTrend API requests.

params.name: request_timeout_ms
params.description: HTTP request timeout for NextTrend API requests. History queries with large result sets may need higher timeouts.

data_sources.name: tag_history
data_sources.description: Time-series history query with start/end range, optional sample_by downsampling, LTTB decimation, and fill modes. Returns timestamped value+quality arrays. QuestDB PGWire backend with dialect-aware SQL.

data_sources.name: tag_browse
data_sources.description: Hierarchical tag browser. Returns folders and tags at a given prefix level. Slash-separated paths (WH/WHK01/Distillery01/). Used for discovery and tag enumeration.

data_sources.name: tag_list
data_sources.description: Paginated tag list with search and prefix filtering. Returns tag metadata: id, name, data_type, unit, description, source, retention_tier, asset_id.

data_sources.name: live_sse
data_sources.description: Server-Sent Events stream for live tag values. 1-second tick rate per subscribed tag. Event format: {tag, value, ts, quality}. Supports JWT query param auth for EventSource clients.

data_sources.name: tag_crud
data_sources.description: Tag metadata CRUD. GET (list/detail), POST (create), PATCH (update), DELETE (soft-delete). Used for tag registration and metadata sync, not data collection.

mappings.description: Slash-separated tag path from NextTrend (e.g., WH/WHK01/Distillery01/Temperature). Primary identifier for historian data points.
UUID assigned by NextTrend. Maps to equipment_id in RecordContext for asset correlation.
Value data type: Float64, Int64, String, Boolean. Determines normalization and quality assessment logic.
Engineering units (°F, PSI, GPM, RPM). Stored in RecordValue.unit and context.extra for downstream unit conversion.

mappings.transform: normalize:OPC-UA code (192→GOOD, 64→UNCERTAIN, 0→BAD) to Forge QualityCode enum
mappings.description: OPC UA quality code from NextTrend. Numeric code preserved in quality_code, label in quality.
Derived area from tag path hierarchy. WH/WHK01/Distillery01/Temp → WH/WHK01. Maps to RecordContext.area.
Original data source identifier (e.g., Ignition tag path, OPC UA node). Preserved for provenance tracking.
NextTrend asset UUID. Links tag to an equipment asset for cross-system correlation.

dead_letter.description: Tag values that fail translation or have unmappable data types are sent to dead letter for manual review.

metadata.source_database: QuestDB (ILP writes via questdb-rs, PGWire reads via tokio-postgres)
metadata.deployment: Docker Compose (historian + web + QuestDB) behind Traefik reverse proxy
metadata.notes: First HISTORIAN-tier Forge adapter. Cross-language spoke: Python adapter wraps Rust REST API. 4-crate workspace (core, storage, api, ingest). Replaces Canary/OSIsoft PI. ~14K tags imported from Canary, live ingest via MQTT/SparkplugB/OPC UA.

integrity.notes: Phase 1 scaffold. REST+SSE adapter for time-series tag data. First historian-tier spoke and first cross-language (Python↔Rust) adapter. Backfill supported via history endpoint time-range queries.
